rules.rule_text:
rule cmd_shell
{
	meta:
		author = "@patrickrolsen"
		reference = "Windows CMD Shell"
		filetype = "EXE"
		version = "0.1"
		date = "1/30/2014"

	strings:
		$s1 = "cmd.pdb"
		$s2 = "CMD Internal Error %s"

	condition:
		uint16( 0 ) == 0x5A4D and ( all of ( $s* ) ) and filesize <= 380KB
}
